{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321231608CF58AB7F83F6FF69781E\"}"},"total":75},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7536874193357226814","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"奇树怪兽，山山水水几万年，值得三听三看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754823086,"group_id":"6986479564587289631","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8NXNO5R7DDsMvDXqFG8fpY5SiwMO2ZM/GNR5taBaDRj","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2760235699156115","user_name":"灵雎宫的姬氏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2760235699156115","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6986479564587289631","book_info":{"abstract":"《山海经》成书于战国至汉初，与《易经》、《黄帝内经》并称为上古三大奇书。全书共十八卷，记载了四十多个邦国、五百五十座山、三百条水道、一百多个历史人物、四百多个神怪异兽，仅三万一千余字，却包含地理、历史、神话、宗教、民族、植物、动物、矿产、医药等诸多方面的内容，是一部想象力非凡的上古百科全书。它深刻并鲜活地反映了上古时代的生活图景，以丰富离奇的幻想和浪漫诡异的笔调，对中国文化产生了深广而久远的影响。《国学典藏·彩图全解山海经（超值全彩白金版）》不仅是社会科学工作者重要的研究对象，也是广大读者获得古代知识的宝库。要了解古代的山川风物、奇兽怪鸟、神仙魔怪、金玉珍宝、神话故事，不可不读《山海经》。但是，由于这部书年代久远，文字艰深难解，许多读者因为文字的障碍，不能饱览其全部风采。鉴于此，我们推出了这本《彩图全解山海经》，对其进行系统而全面的诠释。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/a17479c5268b1db6ce7ea7f8f43b3ff9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"（汉）刘向,刘歆 编；思履 主编","author_id":"","book_id":"6986479564587289631","book_name":"彩图全解山海经","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e8c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"123.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":941,\"name\":\"文学经典\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=941\u0026name=文学经典\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":116,\"name\":\"国学\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=116\u0026name=国学\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6986482060835687431","read_count":"7035","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"211131"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"60","tags":"文学经典,国学","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/a17479c5268b1db6ce7ea7f8f43b3ff9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779290168\u0026x-signature=zA01Uqd79P%2BHIrHJAbr4bHtWqJM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"27"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321231608CF58AB7F83F6FF69781E\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":8132,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12623,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":788},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7007953761281082145","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"妈耶，确实很有意思。但是有很多都不太懂。很想要探索未知的兴趣让我翻了好多资料。总之，虽然我看不太懂，但我大受震撼。确实也能获得一些知识。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1631666390,"group_id":"6986479564587289631","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N//5GTSXeGkBUbDgjnupTR0=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c0d7ad6b43ee4646bd060fb6e199e395~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776617946\u0026x-signature=djh8QIx0NmFkV33VRx4DR7fV59o%3D","user_id":"92931909011","user_name":"白三岁啊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"92931909011","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1751427310,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6986479564587289631","book_info":{"abstract":"《山海经》成书于战国至汉初，与《易经》、《黄帝内经》并称为上古三大奇书。全书共十八卷，记载了四十多个邦国、五百五十座山、三百条水道、一百多个历史人物、四百多个神怪异兽，仅三万一千余字，却包含地理、历史、神话、宗教、民族、植物、动物、矿产、医药等诸多方面的内容，是一部想象力非凡的上古百科全书。它深刻并鲜活地反映了上古时代的生活图景，以丰富离奇的幻想和浪漫诡异的笔调，对中国文化产生了深广而久远的影响。《国学典藏·彩图全解山海经（超值全彩白金版）》不仅是社会科学工作者重要的研究对象，也是广大读者获得古代知识的宝库。要了解古代的山川风物、奇兽怪鸟、神仙魔怪、金玉珍宝、神话故事，不可不读《山海经》。但是，由于这部书年代久远，文字艰深难解，许多读者因为文字的障碍，不能饱览其全部风采。鉴于此，我们推出了这本《彩图全解山海经》，对其进行系统而全面的诠释。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/a17479c5268b1db6ce7ea7f8f43b3ff9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"（汉）刘向,刘歆 编；思履 主编","author_id":"","book_id":"6986479564587289631","book_name":"彩图全解山海经","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e8c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"123.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":941,\"name\":\"文学经典\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=941\u0026name=文学经典\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":116,\"name\":\"国学\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=116\u0026name=国学\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6986482060835687431","read_count":"7035","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"211131"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"60","tags":"文学经典,国学","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/a17479c5268b1db6ce7ea7f8f43b3ff9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779290168\u0026x-signature=zA01Uqd79P%2BHIrHJAbr4bHtWqJM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"770228"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321231608CF58AB7F83F6FF69781E\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":42,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":22157},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7373654492527985435","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书就像一个神秘的宝库，里面有各种奇妙的故事和知识。它不仅让我了解了古代的神话传说，还让我对那个充满想象力的时代有了更深刻的认识。而且书中的彩图真的很精美，让我更直观地感受到了那些奇怪的鸟兽和神奇的地方。我觉得这本书既有趣又能增长知识，很值得一读！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714880153,"group_id":"6986479564587289631","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2x4vgOzRH7TimXIIc1YqNENxqM7FRrpJqNlaf4aVYK5","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2474372528865961","user_name":"喜欢漏卢的沈宏图"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2474372528865961","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6986479564587289631","book_info":{"abstract":"《山海经》成书于战国至汉初，与《易经》、《黄帝内经》并称为上古三大奇书。全书共十八卷，记载了四十多个邦国、五百五十座山、三百条水道、一百多个历史人物、四百多个神怪异兽，仅三万一千余字，却包含地理、历史、神话、宗教、民族、植物、动物、矿产、医药等诸多方面的内容，是一部想象力非凡的上古百科全书。它深刻并鲜活地反映了上古时代的生活图景，以丰富离奇的幻想和浪漫诡异的笔调，对中国文化产生了深广而久远的影响。《国学典藏·彩图全解山海经（超值全彩白金版）》不仅是社会科学工作者重要的研究对象，也是广大读者获得古代知识的宝库。要了解古代的山川风物、奇兽怪鸟、神仙魔怪、金玉珍宝、神话故事，不可不读《山海经》。但是，由于这部书年代久远，文字艰深难解，许多读者因为文字的障碍，不能饱览其全部风采。鉴于此，我们推出了这本《彩图全解山海经》，对其进行系统而全面的诠释。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/a17479c5268b1db6ce7ea7f8f43b3ff9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"（汉）刘向,刘歆
